title: PGIMER Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Junior Research Fellow Posts
description: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for Junior Research Fellow Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the Post Graduation, M.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the PGIMER Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Govern...
